こんにちは、司令官さま。<br>えっ？ このノートですか？ これは……: Hello, Commander. Oh? This notebook? It's...
このノートに、新しい曲の構想をまとめていまして、<br>兵士の皆さんを勇気づける:
I've been outlining a new song concept in this notebook, and I've even
finished a melody to encourage the soldiers.
そのメロディに、英雄の血を引く司令官さまを描いた歌詞を乗せようかと、<br>そう:
I was thinking of setting lyrics to that melody—lyrics that depict you,
Commander, who inherits the blood of the Hero...
あなたの強さを優しさを、そして、たまに見せる弱さも全部乗せた歌詞を。<br>皆さ:
Lyrics capturing your strength, kindness, and occasional weakness. I
want this song to encourage all and be spoken of for generations.
完成したら、最初に聴いてくださいね。この曲は、私の今の……<br>精一杯の想いを:
When it's finished, please be the first to hear it. This song is... an
encouragement for you, Commander, filled with my deepest feelings...
